allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs=d.get\(''''packages'''',{}\); items={k:v.get\(''''version'''',''''''''\) for k,v in pkgs.items\(\) if k in [''''node_modules/react'''',''''node_modules/vite'''',''''node_modules/vitest'''',''''node_modules/tailwindcss'''',''''node_modules/@tailwindcss/vite'''']}; [print\(f''''{k}: {v}''''\) for k,v in items.items\(\)]")
